name: I-Shock Index
description: Inkomba esheshayo enenombolo eyodwa yokuzinza kwe-hemodynamic. Ibalwa njenge-HR / SBP. Okujwayelekile kungu-0.5-0.7.
instructions: Hlukanisa izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo ngomfutho wegazi we-systolic. Inkomba yokushaqeka ekhuphukayo ibonisa ukuwohloka.

scoring.label: Ukushaqeka okukhulu -- ukuvuselelwa ngokushesha, imikhiqizo yegazi

obstetric.note: I-Obstetric Shock Index (OSI) isebenzisa ifomula efanayo. I-SI> 0.9 ezigulini ezikhulelwe ibalulekile. I-HR evamile iphezulu ekukhulelweni (80-100 bpm).
